ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location description of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of station (e.g., buoy, coastal, offshore) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for station maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the station (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wave_data" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor station where the data was collected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "wave_height" REAL /* Height of the waves in feet */,
  "wave_period" REAL /* Period of the waves in seconds */,
  "wave_direction" INTEGER /* Direction from which the waves are coming in degrees */,
  "water_temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the water in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "wave_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the waves in Hz */,
  "wave_energy" REAL /* Energy of the waves in kW */,
  "spectral_data" TEXT /* Spectral data of the waves */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality control status (e.g., passed/failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wave_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wave_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wave prediction model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model's purpose */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the creator who developed the model */,
  "grid_resolution" REAL /* Grid resolution of the model in km */,
  "time_step" REAL /* Time step of the model in seconds */,
  "boundary_conditions" TEXT /* Boundary conditions of the model */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the model (e.g., mean absolute error, correlation coefficient) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that generated the prediction */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement used for the prediction */,
  "predicted_wave_height" REAL /* Predicted wave height in feet */,
  "predicted_wave_period" REAL /* Predicted wave period in seconds */,
  "predicted_wave_direction" INTEGER /* Predicted wave direction in degrees */,
  "predicted_water_temperature" REAL /* Predicted water temperature in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "prediction_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the prediction (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES wave_data ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES wave_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, policymaker) */,
  "notification_settings" TEXT /* Notification settings for the user (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "data_visualization_options" TEXT /* Data visualization options preferred by the user (e.g., charts, maps) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "number_of_reports" INTEGER /* Number of reports generated by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES wave_data ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report's content */,
  "content" TEXT /* The actual content of the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "wave_conditions" TEXT /* Wave conditions analyzed in the report */,
  "models_used" TEXT /* Models used to generate the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_integrity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integrity check log */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the integrity check was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integrity check (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the integrity check */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the integrity check */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken based on the integrity check results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrity_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES wave_data ("measurement_id")
)
